data.body:
[Valentine's Gift from Schale]

Sensei, Schale has prepared a Valentine's Day gift!💙

Check your in-game mailbox to receive your Valentine's Day gift!
(Can be received until 2/21/2022 11:59 PM.)

https://nexon.link/9my
#BlueArchive
